loop1.title: Voltage Monitor (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing live voltage trends (R, Y, B phases) and KPIs (Avg, Max, Min). Thresholds and Y-axis ticks are not measured by this asset's schema and are omitted.

loop2: GIC-26-N10-OG Air Compressor-1 has no logged data — every card renders its real component with per-leaf-null leaves (honest empty). 262 data-bearing alternative(s) offered in the picker.
